CVE-2020-26164.title: In kdeconnect-kde (aka KDE Connect) before 20.08.2, an attacker o ...
CVE-2020-26164.description: In kdeconnect-kde (aka KDE Connect) before 20.08.2, an attacker on the local network could send crafted packets that trigger use of large amounts of CPU, memory, or network connection slots, aka a Denial of Service attack.
